label: Housing affordability
description: Rent control, zoning reform, public housing, tenant protections

label: Medicare / universal healthcare
description: Medicare for All, Medicare buy-in, public option, drug price negotiation

label: Minimum wage
description: Federal minimum wage increase, tipped minimum wage, preemption laws

label: Student debt cancellation
description: Federal student loan forgiveness, public-service loan forgiveness, tuition-free college

label: Climate action
description: Green New Deal, carbon pricing, fossil-fuel subsidy elimination, clean energy

label: Fossil-fuel subsidies
description: Elimination of oil/gas/coal tax preferences, pipeline opposition

label: Campaign finance reform
description: Overturn Citizens United, public financing, dark-money disclosure

label: Voting rights
description: VRA restoration, automatic registration, vote by mail, felon re-enfranchisement

label: Labor rights
description: PRO Act, card check, sectoral bargaining, gig worker classification

label: Immigration
description: Path to citizenship, DREAM Act, ICE reform, asylum protection

label: Gun regulation
description: Background checks, assault weapons ban, permit-to-purchase

label: Reproductive rights
description: Roe codification, contraception access, IVF protection

label: Antitrust enforcement
description: Big Tech breakups, merger enforcement, restoring Brandeis tradition

label: Surveillance reform
description: Section 702 reform, warrant requirement, private data broker limits

label: Carceral reform
description: Private prison ban, sentencing reform, bail reform, police accountability

label: Israel/Palestine policy
description: Military aid conditions, settlement policy, humanitarian aid

label: Tax fairness
description: Top-bracket restoration, wealth tax, corporate minimum, capital gains parity

label: Child care / paid leave
description: Universal pre-K, child tax credit, paid family leave

label: Public education funding
description: Teacher pay, Title I, anti-voucher, school desegregation

label: Trade policy
description: Tariffs, NAFTA/USMCA review, labor/environmental standards in trade deals
